Meta AI
Yesterday
Lo bhai zoom-safe web design ka mockup     Is Design Me Zoom Break Kyun Nahi Hoga:    1. Grid System - repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr)) use kiya. 200% zoom karo to 4 cards ke 2 ho jayenge, neeche shift ho jayenge. Page nahi toote ga.    2. Max-Width Container - Content 1280px se zyada nahi phailta. Center me rehta hai, sides me space aa jati hai zoom pe.    3. Rem Units - Sidebar 15rem hai, 240px nahi. Font size bhi rem me. Browser zoom = sab proportionally bara.    4. No Horizontal Scroll - Table ko overflow-x-auto wrapper me dala. Zoom pe table scroll ho jayegi, pura page nahi.    5. Flexible Sidebar - 15rem fixed, but content area flex-1. Sidebar utna hi rahega, content adjust ho jayega.    Code Me Kaise Banega - Tailwind: <div className="flex min-h-screen">   {/* Sidebar - Zoom safe */}   <aside className="w-60 shrink-0 bg-green-800">...</aside>      {/* Main - Zoom safe */}   <main className="flex-1 max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6">     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4">       {/* 4 Cards - auto adjust */}     </div>          {/* Table - Zoom safe */}     <div className="overflow-x-auto mt-6">       <table className="min-w-full">...</table>     </div>   </main> </div> Test Karo: Ctrl + 3-4 baar dabao. Dekho layout tootta nahi, bas cheezen badi ho kar neeche shift hoti hain.    Ye design 1440px laptop se 200% zoom tak chalega bina toote.    Agli screen chahiye? Cattle Detail Page ya Reports ka bhi zoom-safe mockup bana dun?
